description.ko: 액체 빛과 생물학적 막이 무중력 빈 공간에서 상호작용하는 유기적 호흡의 깊은 탐구.
description.en: A deep exploration of organic respiration where liquid light and biological membranes interact in a weightless void.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Osmotic Breath of Life.' A gargantuan, semi-transparent respiratory membrane system composed of #7FB069 emerald moss-like fibers and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular networks pulsing with internal vitality. The entity is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid vacuum. Thick, viscous ribbons of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar are exhaled from microscopic pores, drifting like liquid silk. Macro focus on the translucent, semi-permeable cellular walls revealing intricate internal capillary systems of glowing sap. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh to capture a divine, breathing organic flow. 8k resolution.
